entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the primary crop studied for cold tolerance during early reproductive growth

entities.name: COLD TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand low temperatures during the reproductive stage

entities.name: POD SET
entities.description: The process of forming pods after flowering, which is often inhibited by cold stress

entities.name: SEED SET
entities.description: The process of forming seeds within pods, requiring higher threshold temperatures than pod set

entities.name: COLD STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress caused by temperatures falling below 10°C, affecting reproductive growth

entities.name: HISAR
entities.description: A subtropical location in northern India where the research was conducted

entities.name: NORTHERN INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the study site Hisar is located

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity in genetic makeup among chickpea lines that influences pod and seed set under cold stress

entities.name: ICCV 88502
entities.description: An early maturing advanced breeding line of chickpea that showed good pod set but limited seed growth in cold spells

entities.name: ICCV 88503
entities.description: An early maturing advanced breeding line of chickpea that showed good pod set but limited seed growth in cold spells

entities.name: K 1189
entities.description: A chickpea germplasm from the former Soviet Union that contributes to cold tolerance

entities.name: SEED GROWTH
entities.description: The development of seeds after pod set, which was found to be limited in certain breeding lines

entities.name: FIELD EVALUATION
entities.description: The process of evaluating chickpea lines in field environments to observe variation in pod and seed set

entities.name: CONTROLLED ENVIRONMENT EVALUATION
entities.description: The process of evaluating chickpea lines in controlled settings to determine temperature thresholds for pod set and seed development

entities.name: PRELIMINARY SCREENING
entities.description: The use of specific thermal regimes to identify cold-tolerant germplasm lines

entities.name: LOW TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Temperatures below 10°C that cause chickpea cultivars to fail to set pods
